headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -145.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 175% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 153 quotes today, with an overwhelming 122 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated and venting hard.

• The frustration score of 96.9 sits in the upper half of the 73-day range, showing sustained high anger levels.

• Fears jumped notably from yesterday while optimism remains deeply negative despite a small improvement.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
